name: Suspicious Usage of C# or Roslyn C# Interactive Console
description: Detects the execution of `csi.exe` or `rcsi.exe`, both Microsoft binaries that provide C# interactive capabilities. Adversaries may use these to execute malicious C# code. While legitimate uses exist, their direct execution can be suspicious.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'csi.exe' or 'rcsi.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the csi.exe or rcsi.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute csi.exe or rcsi.exe.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
